api.name: InputMask
api.description: Masked input for phone numbers, dates, and custom patterns.

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: The unmasked (raw) value — only the mask-significant characters, without literals. Pair with ValueChanged for two-way binding.

parameters.name: ValueChanged
parameters.description: Raised after each edit with the updated raw value.

parameters.name: Mask
parameters.description: The mask pattern: # matches a digit, A a letter, * any character; any other character is a literal inserted verbatim (e.g. "(###) ###-####").

parameters.name: Placeholder
parameters.description: Placeholder shown when empty. When unset, derived from Mask with each significant slot replaced by PromptChar.

parameters.name: PromptChar
parameters.description: Character used to fill unfilled mask slots when building the default placeholder. Defaults to '_'.

parameters.name: Disabled
parameters.description: Disables interaction and dims the input.

parameters.name: Required
parameters.description: Marks the field as required: sets aria-required and renders a destructive-colored asterisk after Label.

parameters.name: Invalid
parameters.description: Forces the invalid/error visual and aria-invalid, independent of any cascaded FormField error state.

parameters.name: ErrorText
parameters.description: Error message shown below the input when invalid and not composed inside a FormField (which owns its own error display).

parameters.name: HelperText
parameters.description: Helper text shown below the input when not invalid and not composed inside a FormField.

parameters.name: Label
parameters.description: Visible label rendered above the input when not composed inside a FormField (which renders its own label).

parameters.name: Name
parameters.description: Field name for the native <input>. Falls back to the cascaded FormField's name when unset.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the input element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes are splatted onto the input element (an explicit id is ignored when inside a FormField).

events.description: Raised after each edit with the updated raw value.

mdSummary:
# InputMask

Masked input for phone numbers, dates, and custom patterns.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Forms/Inputs
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/input-mask

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| InputMask | FormField | `FormField.FormFieldContext?` | `` |  |
| InputMask | Value | `string?` | `` | The unmasked (raw) value — only the mask-significant characters, without literals. Pair with ValueChanged for two-way binding. |
| InputMask | ValueChanged | `EventCallback<string?>` | `` | Raised after each edit with the updated raw value. |
| InputMask | Mask | `string` | `""` | The mask pattern: # matches a digit, A a letter, * any character; any other character is a literal inserted verbatim (e.g. "(###) ###-####"). |
| InputMask | Placeholder | `string?` | `` | Placeholder shown when empty. When unset, derived from Mask with each significant slot replaced by PromptChar. |
| InputMask | PromptChar | `char` | `'_'` | Character used to fill unfilled mask slots when building the default placeholder. Defaults to '_'. |
| InputMask | Disabled | `bool` | `` | Disables interaction and dims the input. |
| InputMask | Required | `bool` | `` | Marks the field as required: sets aria-required and renders a destructive-colored asterisk after Label. |
| InputMask | Invalid | `bool` | `` | Forces the invalid/error visual and aria-invalid, independent of any cascaded FormField error state. |
| InputMask | ErrorText | `string?` | `` | Error message shown below the input when invalid and not composed inside a FormField (which owns its own error display). |
| InputMask | HelperText | `string?` | `` | Helper text shown below the input when not invalid and not composed inside a FormField. |
| InputMask | Label | `string?` | `` | Visible label rendered above the input when not composed inside a FormField (which renders its own label). |
| InputMask | Name | `string?` | `` | Field name for the native <input>. Falls back to the cascaded FormField's name when unset. |
| InputMask | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the input element. |
| InputMask | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Unmatched attributes are splatted onto the input element (an explicit id is ignored when inside a FormField). |

## Slots
- (none)

## Events
- `ValueChanged` (`EventCallback<string?>`) — Raised after each edit with the updated raw value.

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- `FormField` (`FormField.FormFieldContext?`)

## Services it injects
- `IComponentInteropService` ()

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<InputMask />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-destructive`, `--color-foreground`, `--color-input`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--color-ring`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/InputMask/InputMask.razor`
